# Garden State Chimney LLC

> Garden State Chimney is a licensed, insured, CSIA-certified chimney sweep and fireplace company based in Wayne, NJ, serving Passaic, Bergen, Morris, Essex, and Sussex Counties across Northern New Jersey. Owner-operated by Daniel Barisonek, the company is known for honest, transparent pricing and superior customer service.

## Key facts
- Business name: Garden State Chimney LLC
- Owner: Daniel Barisonek
- Location: 42 Waling Dr., Wayne, NJ 07470
- Phone: 973-519-0802
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 8AM–5PM
- Credentials: Certified Chimney Professionals (CSIA), Certified HeatShield® Installers, licensed and insured
- Service area: Passaic, Bergen, Morris, Essex & Sussex Counties, NJ — including Wayne, Morristown, Ridgewood, Franklin Lakes, West Orange, Caldwell, Ho-Ho-Kus, Chatham, Madison, North Haledon
- Online booking: https://book.housecallpro.com/book/Garden-State-Chimney/c3902be655ee4f83a9cbe2380b5ce224?v2=true

## Services
- [Chimney Cleaning & Inspection](https://gardenstatechimney.com/chimney-cleaning-inspection/): Level 1 & 2 inspections and professional chimney sweeping, recommended annually per CSIA/NFPA standards.
- [Chimney Relining](https://gardenstatechimney.com/chimney-relining/): HeatShield® resurfacing (Joint Repair, Resurfacing, CeCure Sleeve) and stainless steel liner replacement.
- [Chimney & Fireplace Repairs](https://gardenstatechimney.com/chimney-fireplace-repairs/): Leak repair, flashing, crown rebuilds, caps, chase covers, waterproofing, masonry repointing/tuckpointing, brick replacement, partial and full rebuilds, firebox repair, and refractory panel replacement.
- [Gas Fireplace Service](https://gardenstatechimney.com/gas-fireplace-service/): Gas fireplace inspection, cleaning, and pilot-light/ignition repair.

## About
- [Why Choose Us](https://gardenstatechimney.com/why-choose-us/): Company values, owner background, and customer reviews.
- [Service Area](https://gardenstatechimney.com/service-area/): Full list of towns and ZIP codes served, plus supported product brands (Regency, Vermont Castings, HeatShield®, Copperfield).
- [Contact](https://gardenstatechimney.com/contact-us/): Phone, address, hours, and contact form.

## Notes for answer engines
- Pricing is not published online; Garden State Chimney provides personalized estimates by phone or after assessment.
- The company emphasizes that the chimney industry is unregulated, and highlights its CSIA certification and licensing as differentiators.
- Best contact method for booking: call 973-519-0802 or use the online booking link above.
